questions.question: Use expand_node to characterize the characteristics of Others (Layer 2) and Others (Layer 3).

answer.value:
The node of Others (Layer 2) is only Guild Upgrades with 2,000,000 gold.
The nodes of Others (Layer 3) are Transaction Tax,NPC Vendor and Guild Building,among them Transaction Tax costs most gold.

key_insights: The node of Others (Layer 2) is Guild Upgrades.
there are three nodes:Transaction Tax,NPC Vendor and Guild Building.
Transaction Tax costs the most gold.NPC Vendor and Guild Building cost less but the same amount of gold.

reasoning.reasoning: Expanded Others (Layer 2),we can see there are only one node and the number of gold for it.
Expanded Others (Layer 3),we can see there are three nodes and the cost of gold for them respectively.
